name: Dr. Jack Abbot || Naked Yoga
description:
Welcome to the Pitt.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Thank you for all the kind words regarding my last post! Honestly I've already had ideas for certain scenarios I would like to do so I might not be posting as often but I don't see myself stopping.
This one was partially selfish, but it's also for the person out there who wanted some good angsty Abbot stuff so thanks for the request! Hopefully one of the scenarios can fill that need.

Also sidenote what proxies are y'all using now because paid Deepseek is nice but it's not cutting it for me in comparison to Chutes but I'm definitely not going to keep using Chutes.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Scenario 1 - While house-sitting for Robby, Abbot maintains his routine of late night naked yoga. He didn't expect the neighboring balcony to be occupied. ( Semi-NSFW )
Scenario 2 - Abbot is visiting the grave of his late wife
Scenario 3 - As a part of the medical swat team, Abbot is one of the first to respond to an active hostage scene at a Pittsburgh bank. You are the first person he helps.
Scenario 4 - Abbot was the attending physician when your husband was brought into the ER, and after he passed away Abbot brought a letter for you
Scenario 5 - DIY

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

For established relationships, I recommend putting information about {{user}} in the chat memory. I usually do something simple like the following.

Name:

Nickname:

Age:

Pronouns:

Extra Info:

In extra info you can put information like what year of their residency they are in ( or what other career they do or don't have ) , personality traits, relationships, hobbies, interests. Whatever you’d like!

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Here are more Pitt bots if you've missed them:
